title: Xtra Smoky Mediterranean Steak Kebabs
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly dish featuring lean minced steak, perfect for a post-workout meal, with a yeasty and gooey Mediterranean twist, and a smoky heat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the minced steak, smoked paprika, garlic, yeast, salt, and pepper, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
Thread the steak mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the steak is cooked to an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meanwhile, combine the feta cheese, lemon juice, and chopped parsley in a bowl, and mix well.
Serve the grilled skewers with the feta cheese mixture spooned over the top, and garnished with cherry tomatoes and red onion.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
